top_signals.title: Nissan discloses employee data breach linked to Oracle zero-day attacks
top_signals.summary: Nissan is warning that it suffered a data breach affecting current and former employees after threat actors exploited an Oracle PeopleSoft vulnerability in data theft attacks previously linked to the ShinyHunters extortion group. [...]
